parts.text:
"Benchmark task: feature-add-small
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Add title-case support to bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs using the existing mode-based pattern. Read bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs and bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs first. Do not add dependencies. Verify with node --test bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
I need to start by reading the two specified files to understand the existing formatTitle implementation and how it should be enhanced with title-case support.

metadata.preview:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

display.text:
import test from 'node:test'
import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'

test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
  assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
  assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
})

state.title: bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs

parts.text: Now I understand the current implementation and the test expectations. I need to add a 'title' mode to the formatTitle function that converts text to title case, then update the test and run it.
